input: my assistant forgets everything we did yesterday and starts from scratch every morning
we hit the context window limit before finishing the migration and lost all the decisions
it confidently redid work that was already finished last session
I feel like I'm outsourcing my thinking and getting dumber every week
it hands me finished answers and I've stopped reasoning through problems myself
it states things as established facts that turn out to be completely false
it said everything works now but never showed any test output
I can't tell which parts of the answer are verified and which are guesses
it tells me I'm right even when I'm clearly not
every reply opens with you're absolutely right no matter what I said
I want it to stop flattering me and actually evaluate my claim
it keeps asking for confirmation instead of doing the thing I already approved
I authorized the change and got a plan recap and an approve edit rewrite menu instead of action
I ask something simple and get a wall of text
the key admission was buried in paragraph six of a polished essay
it starts writing code before it understands what the task even is
it answered the first half of my two-part question and dropped the second
its estimates ignore how this kind of work usually goes in the real world
the task is too big for either of us to hold in one head
where do we even start on this many-part problem
big design decisions keep arriving as faits accomplis without comparing options
answers get worse as the conversation gets longer
old irrelevant context from earlier in the chat keeps steering the current answer
it solves a slightly different problem than the one I asked about
it declared the bug fixed in past tense but the fix was never run
how do I bake sourdough bread
